summary.intent: Refactor the pr-watch skill in the git plugin to replace a polling loop with the Monitor tool, then create a Draft PR and bump version numbers for the git plugin and marketplace.
summary.outcome: Commit 63010f3 was pushed to branch update-pr-watch, Draft PR #89 was created at ronnnnn/cc#89, and versions were bumped: git plugin 2.15.0→2.16.0 and marketplace 3.10.0→3.11.0 with a second commit using message 'chore(git): git プラグインのバージョンを 2.16.0 にバンプ'.

repo: Plugin versioning follows semantic versioning with separate version fields in plugins/git/.claude-plugin/plugin.json and .claude-plugin/marketplace.json — both must be updated together on each release.
Refactoring an existing skill (no new user-facing behavior) warrants a minor version bump, not a patch bump.
PRs are created as Draft by default in this repo's workflow.
The repo uses commitlint with conventional commits (e.g. chore/feat/refactor scoped to the plugin name).
A commit-proposer subagent is used to analyze diffs and generate ranked commit message candidates before user approval.

code.finding: Contains the git plugin version field; bumped from 2.15.0 to 2.16.0.
Contains the marketplace version field; required two edits (two separate Edit tool calls) to complete the update from 3.10.0 to 3.11.0.

workflow: When no explicit version target is provided by the user ('しておいて' only), the agent infers the target plugin and appropriate version bump type from git diff against main.
Version bump type is determined by change nature: refactoring existing skill → minor increment, not patch.
The commit workflow is: status check → stage all → subagent generates candidates → user selects → commit → auto-push if PR exists.

friction: marketplace.json required two separate Edit tool calls to complete the version update, suggesting the first edit was partial or needed correction.
User's version bump request was ambiguous ('しておいて' with no target/version specified), requiring the agent to infer intent from git diff.
open_items: Draft PR #89 (ronnnnn/cc#89) is still in Draft state and needs to be marked ready for review.
The Monitor-based pr-watch refactor (+228/-80 lines) may benefit from additional testing or review before merging.
